title: Decision on the Prosecutor's Position on Pre-Trial Chamber I's 17 February 2005 Decision to Convene a Status Conference
text:
- [...] article 82 paragraph (1) (d) of the Statute specifies the appropriate procedural remedy for the Prosecutor to raise his concerns; (p. 2).

- [...] that the Prosecutor has not availed himself of that procedural mechanism within the time-limits provided for in rule 155 of the Rules; (p. 3).

- [...] by failing to do so, the Prosecutor has waived his right to raise his concerns regarding the convening of the scheduled status conference; (p. 3).

- [...] therefore that there is no procedural basis for the filing of the Prosecutor's Position; (p. 3).
keywords: art. 82.1.d RS : appeal ; appeal against other decisions with certification or leave by the relevant Chamber
art. 82.1.d RS : appeal ; appeal against other decisions with certification or leave by the relevant Chamber ; decision of the relevant Chamber
rule 155.1 RoPE : appeal ; appeal against other decisions with certification or leave by the relevant Chamber ; time limit to request leave
